title: Fix delete inside foreach skipping elements

features.name: foreach loop with delete on associative array
features.description: Code should include a foreach loop iterating over an associative array with delete(idx) called on the current index inside the loop

features.name: foreach loop with delete on queue
features.description: Code should include a foreach loop iterating over a queue with delete(idx) called on the current index inside the loop

features.name: verilator no_optimize protection for foreach delete
features.description: Code should include Verilator-specific $c() no_optimize protection combined with foreach and delete
